ValyaValya is a young Russian girl with straight long light-brown hair and grey eyes, she is of a thin build and wears her hair with bangs. In her videos you can see rubbing, masturbation, fingering, anal penetration, anal penetration with toys (a vibrator and a rectal bulb syringe), sucking (with cum-shot), posing and dancing, usually accompanied by music.Valya made several videos, which can be divided into 3 series Template:Ref. The main series dates from 1996 (as evidenced by a calendar hanged in a door) when she was 9 years old, a second one composed of short clips named pieces from the same time when the main series was filmed and a third one filmed around year 1999 (if judging by the cover of a magazine) when she was between 12 and 13 years old. It is also worth noting that the original VHS tapes were only digitized many years later, as early as 2005, according to their writing library UTC date.The first series comprises 46 videos (Valya-1 to 46) Template:Ref, the second one adds 6 (Valya-piece 1 to 7, number 4 is missing or doesn&apos;t exist) and the third one 4 (Valya-13yo 1 to 4, sometimes labeled Valya-teen) that make up a total of 56 videos, spanning 18 hours 37 minutes and 24 seconds. That is the record for the longest child porn video series of a particular girl ever made.Her exact relation with the man in the videos remains unknown, although it has been suggested he might be her father or a relative, Russian speakers deny this. It seems Valya went to meet him after school as was the case with another girl named Irisa, who also did some videos, albeit not nearly as much as Valya, consisting mostly of posing and sucking. Their current whereabouts are unknown, although it is rumored that Valya attended Moscow University.NotesTemplate:Note Additionally, there is a particularly rare 4 minute film that serves as an introduction for her later work in which she explores the ruins of what appears to be an old abandoned Russian fortress or monastery in the middle of a forest. In one scene you can see her peeing, something that no other video shows. Film ends with a sign that reads: &quot;Lusya is just 9 years old. She lives in a small town in Russia. Lusya dreams to became (sic) a movie star when she gets older, but she doesn&apos;t know, where to begin...&quot;. Lusya (Russian: Люся) is the nickname given to females called Ludmila (Russian: Людмила), possibly Valya&apos;s real name.Template:Note Valya-40 is usually mislabeled as Valya-47 (which doesn&apos;t exist). The comment section in its video information tags it as &quot;v-40&quot;. A similar tag is shown in the comment of Valya-43 (this time &quot;v-43&quot;), proving it refers to video denomination. Similarly, a re-encode of Valya-17 or sometimes an exact duplicate of its original version is mistakenly presented as Valya-40.
